title: Allow a Tesla.Mock handler's spawned process to access sandbox
prompt: A test uses `Tesla.Mock.mock/1` to stub HTTP calls; the mock handler runs in its OWN process when called from an async test. Write `test/my_app/http_mock_test.exs` that: (1) is `async: true`, (2) uses `Tesla.Mock.mock/1` with a handler function that queries `MyApp.Accounts.get_user!/1` (this is where the sandbox access matters), (3) obtains the Tesla mock process pid from the mock registry and calls `Ecto.Adapters.SQL.Sandbox.allow/3` on it.
tier_rationale: Niche library integration — requires knowing Tesla.Mock uses a separate process AND applying allow/3.
